programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Greengrass is trapped by a runaway digger and realises with horror that he has unearthed an unexploded wartime bomb. Nick is interviewing Station Master Hutton about a spate of railway thefts when he is called away to summon the Bomb Squad and to organise the evacuation of the local schoolchildren. But when Colin, a young train enthusiast, goes missing a huge search is mounted. Hutton befriends Colin, and ends up facing a murder charge when a body turns up in a peculiar place. As the experts continue their dangerous work, the bomb begins to tick and there is still no sign of Colin. Furthermore, when the bomb finally goes off and Bellamy surveys the wreckage, there is no sign of Nick.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Two contrasting weddings are taking place in Midsomer - Cully's to Simon, and local baronet Ned Fitzroy's to Beth Porteous. As Cully suffers from last-minute doubts, Barnaby becomes an unwelcome guest at Ned's marriage when the maid of honour is stabbed to death - what are the secrets of Midsomer high society, and will Barnaby get to his daughter's ceremony on time?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: After a night on guard outside Freddie's house, Donna is torn when she realises her mum's court case will be starting shortly. Pearl is shocked to be caught red handed by a half-naked Alan.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ted and Tina bop to some early disco whilst they get No.8 ready for the party. Lloyd warns Becky that Michelle’s worked out that Steve had a one night stand with another bird. Ken tells Ashley how Irma Ogden was an amateur artist and enjoyed copying Lowry’s paintings. Ashey’s disappointed to discover his ‘Lowry’ is a fake. Mel and Darryl arrive at No.8 for the party. Tina tells David she’s invited quite a few friends. Teresa’s annoyed by the music coming from No.8.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tina and David both hungover survey the post party damage at No.8. Sally takes photos of Rosie’s scratches intent on going to the police and reporting Teresa for assault. Kevin tries to talk her out of it. It’s Jason’s birthday. He’s pleased to receive a card from Becky but embarrassed to see posters all over the place announcing it’s his birthday. Michelle overhears Leanne on the phone to Steve and her suspicions grow. Sally goes round to No.6 and confronts Teresa.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Blaketon has his hands full when an elderly archaeologist dies suspiciously and important documents appear to have been stolen from the victim. He also has to deal with trout being poached from Lord Ashfordly's lake and Greengrass deciding to do a spot of treasure hunting! Aunt Eileen plays detective when she visits an old, ruined abbey, causing concern for Greengrass as he searches for buried booty. With Blaketon in hot pursuit, the pair find themselves trapped together underground inside a tunnel that collapses. Their joint worst nightmare becomes reality when they end up side by side in hospital! Gina celebrates her birthday and Nurse Maggie Bolton invites Nick to dinner.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sergeant Blaketon has been receiving complaints about rock music being broadcast from a pirate radio station. Nick and Phil who have been enjoying the music, reluctantly seek out the station which is broadcasting from a ship at sea. They are forced to take action however, when they discover that some of the people involved with the station have been distributing LSD. Nick goes undercover and makes an arresting debut as a DJ! Tragedy strikes when a recently returned young local has a fatal accident after taking the drug. Meanwhile, Greengrass and his friend Joseph decide to brew their own whisky - with explosive results!

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. It's Portwenn Fun Day and the village is buzzing with excitement about this major fundraising event - while PC Penhale is in his element rallying the runners and whipping up support, the event sparks culinary rivalry between Bert and the landlord of the Crab and Lobster pub as they are both keen to take advantage of the day and boost their takings by providing food for the runners and spectators. The seafood soiree and cut-price drinks at the Crab and Lobster look set to win the culinary competition, but Bert smells a rat and calls in PC Penhale to investigate. When the Doc puts paid to Mark's enterprise after diagnosing an infection which means that he must not handle food, Bert seizes the opportunity to take over the soiree... meanwhile, Louisa's mum Eleanor arrives in Portwenn unexpectedly but Louisa is far from happy about her arrival. Martin is even less pleased to see Eleanor, and neither he nor Louisa are happy with her solution to their baby's wailing...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. PC Penhale has an unexpected visit from his ex-wife Maggie, but she appears to have completely forgotten that they split up a couple of years ago - when he tries to tell her that they are no longer married, she accuses him of overreacting and wants to know why he packed his bags and left her. As Penhale struggles with a mixture of distress and elation at seeing Maggie again, he realises that she is clearly not well when she tells him that she thinks that it is April 2008 and that she woke up to find him gone - he tries to ask Martin about Maggie's symptoms without telling him that he is talking about his ex-wife, but he is also terrified of losing Maggie again and wants to make the most of every moment of being back together. Meanwhile, romance may be in the air for Louisa's mother Eleanor when she meets old school friend Paul, the Doc tries to treat Morwenna when she arrives at work with blood dripping from her foot, and Martin and Louisa finally name their baby.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. When investigative journalist Matt Barber is found dead in a remote village, Banks and his team are faced with a number of leads - Banks then notices a connection between the case and a mysterious death in the 1980s involving members of a cult rock band. As he begins to unpick decades of lies, he is all too aware that the victim's father is Jack Barber, a former senior police officer and candidate in local police commissioner elections - despite his formidable reputation, DI Helen Morton is convinced that Jack is obstructing the enquiry in some way. Banks is then shaken to the core when a link between a suspect and DS Annie Cabbot reveals secrets from her personal life which throw their relationship into question...

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Gritty detective series based on novels by Peter Robinson. With David Hornby now a suspect in the case, Annie is forced to admit that the father of her baby knows nothing about her pregnancy - Banks tries to be supportive, but Annie soon finds that juggling the affections of her boss and her ex-lover leads to a difficult choice. When Banks and Helen learn that Ian Basset has returned to the country, the surviving members of The Crystal Kiss are reunited and the trio seem more bonded than ever - Annie then makes a discovery about Martin Harford's confession in the John Gaunt case and learns that Jack Barber was the original investigating officer. Helen believes that she has the evidence she needs to push Barber harder, but when Banks hears of a mysterious tape recording that appears to bind both Jack and The Crystal Kiss together, he realises that he is in a race against time to find the tape and understand its significance if he has any hope of uncovering the truth.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Detective drama. When Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of a young orphan, forensic evidence leads them to suspect there is a link with an old rock band on the verge of a comeback - following a report of a disturbance of the peace, Lewis pays a visit to the mansion of rock legend Richie Maguire. Once there, Lewis is shocked to see Esme Ford, an iconic singer who faked her own death 35 years before - it seems Lewis's favourite band are on the verge of a comeback, but Lewis is not the only person keen to see the band reform.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Blakey discovers that Stan and Jack are biting the hand that feeds them.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Fearful Symmetry: When a babysitter is found dead, Lewis and Hathaway are drawn into diverse new worlds including squats, swinging suburbia, primate labs and fetish photography. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep3

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The Indelible Stain: Lewis and Hathaway investigate when a controversial American academic is murdered after speaking at Oxford's Department of Criminology. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep4

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse. May 1966 - Endeavour returns to Oxford City Police after a four-month absence from duty and is reunited with Thursday. Meanwhile, a Broad Street parade celebrating the might of Britain's military accomplishments is soured by a rash student stunt and thrown into sharp relief when an anonymous man plummets to his death from a nearby council building - a clutch of business cards bearing multiple identities suggest the death was more than just a routine suicide, and Endeavour flexes his gumshoe muscles to uncover the corpse's identity in a solitary pursuit that builds to a trip to London with troubling consequences. As a concerned Thursday looks on, the young Morse pulls two seemingly unrelated cases into the fray - an anguished father who is searching for a missing daughter and a smash-and-grab robbery of medieval artefacts at Oxford's Beaufort College - as he risks all to bring those responsible to justice.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Lymstock is a town with more than its share of shameful secrets, a town where even a sudden outbreak of anonymous hate mail causes only a minor stir - however, Miss Marple believes that there is more to the case than meets the eye when Mona Symmington takes her own life as a result of one of the letters. The town is thrown into turmoil as the letters become ever more deadly - someone local must be responsible, so can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Tom Barnaby and DS Ben Jones investigate a land feud involving two farming dynasties which explodes into violence - trouble seems to be brewing in the pretty village of Ford Florey when a tract of waste ground dubbed the Swamp becomes the focus of a land dispute between two old agricultural families. Tensions are increased further after a band of travellers also lay claim to the site with a view to developing it into a place where they can settle - matters come to a head at the town's annual Fayre. While some villagers are taking part in a shootout reconstruction at a Wild West show, a woman is shot for real - she turns out to be the farm manager for one of the feuding families and the timing of her death raises questions. Barnaby and Jones launch a murder investigation and uncover a series of seething grudges within the village before another person is killed - does the Swamp hold the key to identifying the murderer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: On a dark night in the village of March Magna, Barnaby's wife Joyce swerves her car to narrowly miss a shadowy figure in the road... or so she thinks. Later that night a body is discovered in the old cemetery - did Joyce hit someone after all, or was the victim - who seems to have plenty of enemies - killed by one of the villagers? Barnaby and Jones have their work cut out as all the villagers seem to be hiding something, but is it murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Piano student Zoe Stock has won a place at the Devington Manor Winter School led by internationally renowned musician Sir Michael Fielding when, from the riverbank in the grounds of the manor, she sees a woman jump from the bridge and disappear underwater - when Barnaby and Jones start investigating the possible drowning, they discover unsavoury connections to the past that could prove lethal 20 years later. Can they intervene before the body count escalates, and will the talented Zoe survive her master class?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Betrayal, infidelity and blackmail fester as plans to re-enact a Victorian prizefight turn nasty - and even DCI Barnaby finds his judgement clouded by an old friend. Midsomer Morchard prepares to welcome back local boxer John Kinsella from his world title fight victory in New York - Kinsella is returning with his ruthless and controlling promoter Frank Bishop to take part in a re-enactment of a match from 1860. When Bishop arrives, he goes to see solicitor Giles Braithwaite but instead finds the lawyer dead - meanwhile, trainer Teddy Molloy is working with another fighter called Ken Tuohy, who suspects Kinsella of a dalliance with his fiancee. There are plenty of other grudges and secrets simmering in the village, with revelations of discord, adultery, gambling and Giles's assistant Iris being accused of blackmail. When it comes time for the re-enactment, Tuohy takes the place of Kinsella's opponent and attacks Kinsella - Bishop is then found dead. Can Barnaby find the killer?

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. The murder of a woman discovered in her flat initially presents as a break-in gone wrong but soon appears to be something more and leads Grace to question whether this attack was targeted - the victim Hannah Belling, a psychiatrist and founder of a popular mental health app, was well liked, but it becomes clear that she had enemies as Grace delves deeper. A number of compelling suspects present themselves - an ex-husband causing an acrimonious divorce, an obsessive stalker fired from Hannah's company, a missing brother with a criminal past, and a mysterious lover as the team also discover that Hannah's office was broken into a few days before her death - did she have something that her attacker would kill for? When blood found in Hannah's flat then reveals a chilling discovery, Roy realises that Hannah's killer is just within reach and that her death isn't the only secret they are keeping as the painful truth at the heart of the murder turns Grace's world upside down.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: DI Frost investigates if three male bodies found buried naked in the shape of a triangle are part of a satanic ritual, but will closer analysis lead him in a different direction? Meanwhile, ruthless millionaire press baron James Callum is determined to make his mark on Denton and will stop at nothing to get what he wants - will Frost be able to stop Callum in his tracks before his actions lead to fatal consequences?

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Temperatures rise when the station surgery gets a new recruit.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse is haunted by his past when he investigates the apparent suicide of a terminally ill Oxford don and finds that he has an unexpected and painful personal connection with the don's family.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Happy Families: Morse becomes the unwitting victim of a hate campaign in the tabloid press while investigating the murder of a well-known business tycoon at his country mansion. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep2

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part case of the light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Lyvedon Manor is both a source of pride and a drain on the finances for Martin Frazer and his wife Suzanne - Martin is a barrister who hires Rosemary and Thyme to restore his walled garden as it has fallen into disrepair. It's a big job, but Martin has a ready source of cheap labour - the inmates of the local prison. Rosemary is nervous about working with ex-cons, and her suspicions are confirmed when Martin's cousin Jim is found drowned in the local fast-flowing river - as Laura and Rosemary struggle to bring the garden back to life, events take a mysterious turn when cousin Jim is seen alive again just before the coroner's inquest into his death.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: The first part of a two-part case of the light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Lyvedon Manor is both a source of pride and a drain on the finances for Martin Frazer and his wife Suzanne - Martin is a barrister who hires Rosemary and Thyme to restore his walled garden as it has fallen into disrepair. It's a big job, but Martin has a ready source of cheap labour - the inmates of the local prison. Rosemary is nervous about working with ex-cons, and her suspicions are confirmed when Martin's cousin Jim is found drowned in the local fast-flowing river - as Laura and Rosemary struggle to bring the garden back to life, events take a mysterious turn when cousin Jim is seen alive again just before the coroner's inquest into his death.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When Tommy and Tuppence visit an elderly aunt in her nursing home, Tuppence is concerned by some odd behaviour of the staff and residents - when Tuppence later hears about Aunt Ada's sudden death and the disappearance of her aunt's friend Mrs Lancaster, she realises that her concerns were right. Tuppence then meets Miss Marple to follow a path of clues that leads them to the village of Farrell St Edmund - and find a community that is guarding an array of secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A planning dispute turns to murder after a leading light in the Midsomer Conservation Society suspects her neighbours are involved in a money-making development scam. Political wrangling, burglaries and sexual liaisons abound in picturesque Great Pelfe, but why is someone driven to start killing? As Maureen is attacked with a broken bottle in the grounds and bleeds to death, planning officer Liz Gerrard beds Rogers and police discover that the victims of a spate of burglaries and vandalism all support a controversial development at Pelfe Chase. Barnaby then finds a catapult at Maureen's house - was she the vandal? As Election Day approaches, Jones suspects that Fiona has given Norman Swascombe free land as a bung, but the truth surprises him - meanwhile, a night of passion for Liz and Otley turns deadly... As Dr Bullard discovers that Rogers was killed using Otley's veterinary drugs, Barnaby realises that the murderer will not stop until everyone who knows the truth is silenced.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: John Nettles makes his final appearance as DCI Tom Barnaby - with his birthday approaching, Tom reluctantly accompanies his wife Joyce on a spa weekend to Swavely Manor. The atmosphere at the spa is far from tranquil as owner Phoebe Archbold has fallen out with her old friend and wannabe novelist Miranda Bedford - when a woman is found dead in the flotation chamber, Barnaby calls in DS Jones to lead the investigation. Seeking refuge at the village pub, Barnaby learns that Phoebe married Luke after the sudden death of her first husband and Miranda's friend Carter Smith reveals he is helping her with her novel although many in the village doubt that the book really exists - back at the spa, Luke is crushed to death by a training machine soon after being threatened by Carter. After another gruesome discovery, the truth gradually emerges - as the net closes in on the killer, all Barnaby has to worry about is his birthday party, retirement, and welcoming cousin DCI John Barnaby to Causton.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Neil Dudgeon's first appearance as the head of Causton CID. John Barnaby initially rebuffs a request from Harriet Wingate, headmistress at the upmarket Darnley Park Girls School, to patrol their forthcoming classic car show, but Barnaby is intrigued when he learns that the remains of famous racing driver Duncan Palmer have been discovered at Darnley Park 40 years after he was thought to have drowned in the Lake District. Harriet is opposed to the plans of school governor Jamie Cameron and so invites his ex-wife Kate together with her father, racing legend Peter Fossett, to the show - Fossett is annoyed that his fellow judge is club DJ Dave 'Doggy' Day, who knows nothing about cars. Soon afterwards, Doggy is crushed to death under Kate's car and Barnaby thinks the video diaries of two pupils could hold clues to the killing, but a new lead takes him to meet someone at the barn where Duncan Palmer met his death. When the killer turns on him, could Barnaby's first case also be his last?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI John Barnaby takes on another case as the head of Causton CID. A social services investigator calls on elderly eccentrics William Bingham and his wife Mary but is sent away rudely by their daughter Selina and her husband Eddie Stanton - the Binghams live as recluses in upper-class squalor while the nearby Stantons run a stud farm with Ben Viviani, who is in love with Eddie's daughter Verity. Ben's mother Maggie had also humiliated the investigator - when his body is found in a river, they therefore all come under suspicion. Barnaby meets the Binghams and learns that they never recovered from losing their elder daughter and son in a drowning accident - passions are then aroused as Selina forces Ben to take her to bed before slashing Maggie's paintings with a knife. Mary later invites Barnaby to tea, but he discovers before he arrives that her daughter's body was never found - and then Mary is found dead. Could a mysterious reference to a moon crater called Bingham hold a clue?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A reclusive couple are found dead after being victims of a supposedly botched burglary which shocks the occupants of the village of Dunstan - when a guest is murdered at the wedding at one of Jones' oldest friends, could this spate of killings be connected to a mystery of a fatal road accident and the disappearance of a teenager 20 years ago?

programme.title: Playing Nice
programme.desc: Psychological thriller series, adapted from the best-selling novel by JP Delaney, that is set against a sweeping Cornish landscape. Pete is questioned by the police as Miles leaks the story to the press and costs Pete his job - with his life unravelling, Pete realises that he must dig into Miles' murky past to save his family.

programme.title: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: The last episode of the thrilling spy drama. Weir is forced to play his final ace when Crowley's nefarious operation to win support of the Shared Data Act and hijack democracy succeeds, but Crowley's counterstrike puts both Liv and Ben in mortal danger.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. When Rick is arrested for allegedly killing a hitman hired to murder his mentor Icepick, Thomas finds himself in the midst of a tangled investigation, especially when Rick doesn't deny any of the charges and gives a full confession. However, it is not long before Thomas is on the trail of the real culprit with the help of a resourceful accountant.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: The concluding part of a two-part episode of the classic US detective drama. Finding himself suspended, Theo tries to retrace his movements while tackling a murder case from eight years ago to discover whether he shot the wrong man or not.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: The Persistent Patriots: Drama series following the adventures of suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint saves the life of a British colony's prime minister. [SL,S] S5 Ep15

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The first episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Harry Crawford retires from the fire brigade and Ken Boon is forced to resign when his lungs are damaged while rescuing a boy from a blaze - Harry buys seedy hotel The Grand while Ken buys a caravan called The Ponderosa and tries to make a living as a market gardener. When Harry suggests that Ken should supplement his income by offering to do odd jobs for people, he places an advert in the local paper - his first client is Barney Spitz, a pop music promoter who wants Ken to dress up in an old fireman's uniform and star in a pop video.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is assigned to ensure the safe shipment of a gold bullion consignment threatened by the plans of a brilliant computer expert bent on revenge.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. A new team hoist the Giant Nut and are crowned as the sixth series world champions as the final four bots face off in the ultimate robotic fight to the death.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: The episode originally intended to be the last of the classic US action drama series. Thomas is shot in a warehouse and lapses into a coma, but his mind remains active - even though his body is temporarily out of action, Thomas helps his ex-wife evade killers set on ending her life.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Case Without A File: When Theo discovers that a murdered private eye had acquired secret police files, he spreads the word that the victim is still alive. [S] S5 Ep11

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Kate O'Mara guest stars in the adventure series featuring stylish troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint finds himself teetering between two women racing drivers who are rivals in love and on the track.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Irish actor Stephen Rea guest stars in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. An amnesiac can't even remember his own name - the only thing he knows is that he has a great deal of money with him and no idea where it came from or how he acquired his wealth, so Ken lends his services as an investigator.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. New recruit Bob Hargreaves joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but is the newcomer up to it? Jack Regan thinks not, but nobody seems to share his view...

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got the more important matter of a cash flow problem on his mind.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike has injured his back, but he cannot afford to take time off to recuperate - meanwhile, the guys make a big mistake while exploring a 92-year-old Iowa farmer's collection and counsel a prolific collector from Ohio who is reluctant to part with a 1948 Rock-Ola jukebox.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Jack Jesse must survive the arctic wilderness and cross a frozen river alone to reach the isolated town of Bettles. Elsewhere, Lisa Kelly is back in action, but the slippery slopes of the Dalton will make her road to redemption a dangerous one.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dalton rookie Ray Veilleux drives into a trucker's worst nightmare when he's distracted for a second, Lisa roars up the Dalton with an unwieldy bear cage in tow, and trouble is heating up for the Polar Bear when he ignores his poorly loaded cargo.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: Documentary series that examines some of the darker stories from the golden age of professional wrestling. A private Boeing 757 flight descends into a nightmare as intoxicated wrestlers clash with their flight crew and erupt into one of wrestling's most infamous scandals.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan and Carter go after Billy Medhurst, a man who was implicated in a robbery in which a policeman was shot... but is the past clouding Regan's judgement?

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: Formula E Live
programme.desc: Live coverage of the Round Eight E-Prix from Berlin. German driver Pascal Wehrlein will hope to delight the locals with another win to maintain his push for the title. [S]

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Ray Veilleux spins out into oncoming big rigs, Jack Jessee battles a 200-ton monster haul to Prudhoe, Alex Debogorski risks a bust by the DOT, and Lisa Kelly races to raise cash to buy back her horse.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. With its last battle having been fought, the Peninsula War is finally over for Britain and her allies, but the action does not end here for Sharpe as he is framed by his long-time enemy Ducos and accused of stealing Napoleon's treasures. Sharpe also finds himself abandoned by his wife Jane, who returns to England and meets the handsome Lord Rossendale - now on the run from both the English and the French, Sharpe must find a way to prove his innocence.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes Lakes in Devon. The mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp, with the bite filmed on an underwater camera. Small lakes in springtime can be notoriously tricky, so with the addition of a diver and underwater cameras, this will be no easy task. After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes into the forbidding Alaskan wilderness to visit two large lakes.

programme.title: Creed III
programme.desc: Boxing drama sequel. Adonis Creed has been thriving in both his career and family life after dominating the boxing world, but he is eager to prove that he deserves his shot in the ring when childhood friend and former boxing prodigy Damian resurfaces after serving a long sentence in prison. The face-off between former friends is more than just a fight - to settle the score, Adonis must put his future on the line to battle Damian, a fighter who has nothing to lose and everything to win.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Creed III
programme.desc: Boxing drama sequel. Adonis Creed has been thriving in both his career and family life after dominating the boxing world, but he is eager to prove that he deserves his shot in the ring when childhood friend and former boxing prodigy Damian resurfaces after serving a long sentence in prison. The face-off between former friends is more than just a fight - to settle the score, Adonis must put his future on the line to battle Damian, a fighter who has nothing to lose and everything to win.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: As Albert, Charlie and Billy process their windfall, footage of the heist goes viral, reaching the eyes of Bob Fink, a dirty cop with old ties to the Hill family.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. When Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with a new minder - his nephew Ray - and ambitions to move into Europe... however, Ray seems more susceptible to a con than Arthur's customers, but when Arthur is aghast when he accepts a bouncing cheque, Ray soon proves himself brighter than his uncle had suspected.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians, former showgirl Rachel Phelps (Margaret Whitton), has a sweetheart deal to move the team to Miami. But to break the lease with the city of Cleveland, ticket sales have to plummet. So Phelps hires the most incompetent players available, including near-blind pitcher Rick Vaughn (Charlie Sheen) and injury-prone catcher Jake Taylor (Tom Berenger). But her villainous tactics accidentally foster a can-do team spirit, turning the Indians into potential winners.

programme.title: Bull Durham
programme.desc: In Durham, N.C., the Bulls minor league baseball team has one asset no other can claim: a poetry-loving groupie named Annie Savoy (Susan Sarandon). As the team's season begins, Annie selects brash new recruit Ebby Calvin Laloosh (Tim Robbins), whom she christens "Nuke," to inspire with the religion of baseball. Nuke also receives guidance from veteran player Crash Davis (Kevin Costner), who settles Nuke's erratic pitching and teaches him to follow the catcher's lead.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: Failed college coach Norman Dale gets a chance at redemption when he is hired to direct the basketball program at a high school in a tiny Indiana town. After a teacher persuades star player Jimmy Chitwood to quit and focus on his long-neglected studies, Dale struggles to develop a winning team in the face of community criticism for his temper and his unconventional choice of assistant coach: Shooter, a notorious alcoholic.

programme.title: Blue Chips
programme.desc: Pete Bell (Nick Nolte) is a college basketball coach who has to improve his team's standing -- by any means necessary. His hopes are pinned on a trio of talented players: Neon Boudeaux (Shaquille O'Neal), Butch McRae (Penny Hardaway) and Ricky Roe (Matt Nover). But in order to get them to sign to his school, Bell will have to illegally pay the players off. If he's caught, it could destroy Bell's coaching career and cast a cloud of shame over his team. Will he risk it all to win?

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A new arrival throws the town into chaos; Jade and Tabitha struggle with their revelation at the Bottle Tree; Boyd grapples with the implications of Smiley's return.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Unprotected Sets
programme.desc: Nothing is off limits for Marlena Rodriguez; Ali Sultan reflects on his journey from the Middle East to Minnesota.

programme.title: Sky Captain and the World of Tomorrow
programme.desc: When gigantic robots attack New York City, "Sky Captain" (Jude Law) uses his private air force to fight them off. His ex-girlfriend, reporter Polly Perkins (Gwyneth Paltrow), has been investigating the recent disappearance of prominent scientists. Suspecting a link between the global robot attacks and missing men, Sky Captain and Polly decide to work together. They fly to the Himalayas in pursuit of the mysterious Dr. Totenkopf (Laurence Olivier), the mastermind behind the robots.

programme.title: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Harvard graduate James Averill (Kris Kristofferson) is the sheriff of prosperous Jackson County, Wyo., when a battle erupts between the area's poverty-stricken immigrants and its wealthy cattle farmers. The politically connected ranch owners fight the immigrants with the help of Nathan Champion (Christopher Walken), a mercenary competing with Averill for the love of local madam Ella Watson (Isabelle Huppert). As the struggle escalates, Averill and Champion begin to question their decisions.

programme.title: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse
programme.desc: What could possibly go wrong when three buddies (Tye Sheridan, Logan Miller, Joey Morgan) decide to join the Boy Scouts? When bloodthirsty, undead ghouls invade their once-peaceful town, it's up to kindhearted Ben, quick-witted Carter and class clown Augie to save the day. With help from Denise (Sarah Dumont), a beautiful but tough cocktail waitress, the boys must put their scouting skills to the ultimate test to save mankind and earn their zombie-killing badges.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: Jonathan is the most popular player in the fastest and most extreme sport of all time: rollerball. Along with teammates Marcus and Aurora, Jonathan is giving viewers what they want: visceral thrills, breakneck speed, and head-slamming action. Things go wrong when rollerball's creator, Petrovich, realizes that serious on-court accidents bring higher ratings. Soon Jonathan and his friends are playing for their lives.

programme.title: A.I.: Artificial Intelligence
programme.desc: A robotic boy, the first programmed to love, David is adopted as a test case by a Cybertronics employee and his wife. Though he gradually becomes their child, a series of unexpected circumstances make this life impossible for David. Without final acceptance by humans or machines, David embarks on a journey to discover where he truly belongs, uncovering a world in which the line between robot and machine is both vast and profoundly thin.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A.
programme.desc: In 2013, the United States president was exiling all citizens who don't conform to his hyper-conservative views to Los Angeles, which became an island after a huge earthquake. But, when the president's daughter nabs the detonator to her dad's apocalyptic weapon and sneaks into L.A. to be with the rebel leader she loves, the government taps commando-turned-crook Snake Plissken to retrieve the young woman. And, if he doesn't succeed quickly, he'll be executed.

programme.title: Stargate
programme.desc: In modern-day Egypt, professor Daniel Jackson (James Spader) teams up with retired Army Col. Jack O'Neil (Kurt Russell) to unlock the code of an interstellar gateway to an ancient Egypt-like world. They arrive on a planet ruled by the despotic Ra (Jaye Davidson), who holds the key to the Earth travelers' safe return. Now, in order to escape from their intergalactic purgatory, Jackson and O'Neil must convince the planet's people that Ra must be overthrown.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: In this Zemeckis-directed adaptation of the Carl Sagan novel, Dr. Ellie Arroway races to interpret a possible message originating from the Vega star system. Once first contact with an extraterrestrial intelligence is proven, Arroway contends with restrictive National Security Advisor Kitz and religious fanatics bent on containing the implications of such an event. An incredible message is found hidden in the signal, but will Arroway be the one to answer its call?

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: In the near future, "The Running Man" is the top-rated show on television, a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards is convinced by the show's ruthless producer to enter the game as a last resort. Ratings soon skyrocket as Ben's defiance, instincts and grit turn him into an unexpected fan favorite, as well as a threat to the entire system.

programme.title: Afterburn
programme.desc: After a massive solar flare destroys the Eastern Hemisphere, a treasure hunter for hire ventures to Europe to retrieve the coveted Mona Lisa, only to learn that the world needs a hero more than it needs a painting.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi (Elizabeth Berkley) arrives in Las Vegas with only a suitcase and a dream of becoming a top showgirl. She quickly befriends Molly (Gina Ravera), who works at the high-profile Stardust Hotel, and lands a job at a seedy strip club. A chance meeting with Cristal (Gina Gershon), the Stardust's marquee dancer, and her powerful boyfriend, Zack (Kyle MacLachlan), brings Nomi one step closer to realizing her dream. But, as she ascends to the top, Nomi begins to wonder if it's all worth it.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the legendary Mitch Buchannon leads his elite squad of lifeguards on a mission to prove that you don't have to wear a badge to save the bay. Joined by a trio of hotshot recruits, including former Olympian Matt Brody, they ditch the surf and go deep under cover to take down a ruthless businesswoman whose devious plans threaten the future of the bay.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: In Chicago, honor-driven Sgt. Eddie Cusack (Chuck Norris) and his team stake out a drug exchange involving notorious drug czar Luis Camacho (Henry Silva). Cusack is caught off guard, however, when rival Mafia kingpin Tony Luna (Mike Genovese) and his disguised crew show up, unleash a torrent of gunfire on Camacho's crew and make off with both cash and cocaine. Now Cusack must fight both gangs -- and corruption in his own department -- in order to stop the drug war.

programme.title: Mystic Pizza
programme.desc: For sexy Daisy Araujo, her sensible sister Kat and their wisecracking friend Jojo, the summer after high school is a summer they can never forget. Slinging pizza at a local restaurant, the three girls share their hopes, dreams and plans for escaping their small town.

programme.title: Elizabethtown
programme.desc: Aspiring young shoe designer Drew Baylor (Orlando Bloom) gets fired from his high-profile job after the failure of his latest project. To make matters worse, his girlfriend, Ellen (Jessica Biel), leaves him, and he becomes suicidal. Drew's morbid plans are interrupted by the news of his father's death, and he is called back to his Kentucky hometown. On his flight home, he meets the lovely Claire (Kirsten Dunst), a sunny flight attendant who tries to help him embrace life once again.

programme.title: Some Kind of Wonderful
programme.desc: Keith Nelson (Eric Stoltz), an artsy high school outcast, tries to land a date with popular girl Amanda Jones (Lea Thompson) with some help from his tomboy best friend, Watts (Mary Stuart Masterson). However, his advances draw the ire of Amanda's snobby ex-boyfriend, Hardy Jenns (Craig Sheffer), who makes plans to get even. Matters are further complicated when Watts realizes she likes Keith as more than just a friend and tries to convince him to stop pursuing Amanda.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) has it all. She wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But there is one thing stopping him (Matthew Davis) from proposing: She is too blond. Elle rallies all of her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) journeys to Washington, D.C., to have her say about animal rights, but is ignored by every politician she encounters and quickly learns that the White House can be even tougher to navigate than the Ivy League. Finally, Elle makes the acquaintance of sympathetic Rep. Victoria Rudd (Sally Field), who helps the young lawyer get her foot in the door of Congress. Unfortunately, Elle still has to convince the entire legislature to hear her out.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: George Banks (Steve Martin) and his wife, Nina (Diane Keaton), are the proud parents of Annie (Kimberly Williams), but when she returns from studying abroad and announces that she's engaged, their whole world turns upside down, especially that of overprotective George. From meeting the in-laws to wedding plans with an over-the-top consultant (Martin Short) and his flamboyant assistant (B.D. Wong), it seems as if the troubles never end in this update of the classic Spencer Tracy comedy.

programme.title: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: A young man (Matthew McConaughey) continues to live at the home of parents who, in desperation to push him out of the nest once and for all, hatch a plan. They hire a beautiful woman (Sarah Jessica Parker) to entice him to assume the mantle of responsibility and get his own place.

programme.title: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: (CC) Catch Her If You Can. 'Roberts and Gere confirm their status as an eternal screen team' in this delightful laugh-filled romantic comedy. Roberts plays small-town girl Maggie Carpenter, whose marches down the aisle become a series of near Mrs. when she bolts before saying 'I do.' Gere is Ike Graham, a cynical, big-city newspaper columnist eager to write a tell-all story about Maggie. But the more Ike finds out about the skittish Maggie, the more he finds he's falling in love.

programme.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Lovable Englishman Charles and his group of friends seem to be unlucky in love. When Charles meets a beautiful American named Carrie at a wedding, he thinks his luck may have changed. But, after one magical night, Carrie returns to the States, ending what might have been. As Charles and Carrie's paths continue to cross -- over a handful of nuptials and one funeral -- he comes to believe they are meant to be together, even if their timing always seems to be off.

programme.title: Benny & Joon
programme.desc: Benny (Aidan Quinn), who cares for his mentally disturbed sister, Joon (Mary Stuart Masterson), also welcomes the eccentric Sam (Johnny Depp) into his home at Joon's request. Sam entertains Joon while he dreams of a job at the video store. Once Benny realizes Joon and Sam have started a relationship, he kicks Sam out of the house. This leads to an altercation between brother and sister. Joon runs away with Sam, who soon realizes that she may need more support than he alone can provide.

programme.title: The Pope of Greenwich Village
programme.desc: Cousins Paulie (Eric Roberts) and Charlie (Mickey Rourke) plan to rob a merchant in the New York City neighborhood that's home to the restaurant where they work. When their scheme results in the death of a police officer and draws the ire of the Mafia-linked businessman who was ripped off, Charlie's girlfriend (Daryl Hannah) bolts, and mob henchmen exact a brutal price from Paulie. With the mob threatening to kill them, the thieves must think fast if they intend to survive.

programme.title: Summer Days, Summer Nights
programme.desc: On the south shore of Long Island in the summer of 1983, a group of working-class teenagers and 20-somethings work their summer jobs, fall in and out of love, and wrestle with what the future holds when the summer ends and the real world beckons.

programme.title: For a Few Dollars More
programme.desc: In the Wild West, a murderous outlaw known as El Indio and his gang are terrorizing and robbing the citizens of the region. With a bounty on El Indio's head, two bounty hunters, Monco and Col. Douglas Mortimer, come to collect the prize. Upon their first meeting, the two men view each other as rivals, but they eventually agree to become partners in their mutual pursuit of the vicious criminal.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Now a traveling mercenary, Hercules must once again become a hero to help the benevolent king of Thrace protect his people from a powerful warlord.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: The Double Deuce is the meanest, loudest and rowdiest bar south of the Mason-Dixon Line, and Dalton (Patrick Swayze) has been hired to clean it up. He might not look like much, but the Ph.D.-educated bouncer proves he's more than capable -- busting the heads of troublemakers and turning the roadhouse into a jumping hot-spot. But Dalton's romance with the gorgeous Dr. Clay (Kelly Lynch) puts him on the bad side of cutthroat local big shot Brad Wesley (Ben Gazzara).

programme.title: Valkyrie
programme.desc: Col. Claus von Stauffenberg serves Germany with loyalty and pride but fears that Hitler will destroy his country if allowed to run unchecked. With time running out for Germany and the rest of Europe, von Stauffenberg joins a group of like-minded, high-ranking men who want to overthrow the Nazi regime from within. With everything he holds dear in the balance, von Stauffenberg becomes the trigger man in a plot to assassinate the evil dictator.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: A Secret Service agent is taunted by calls from a would-be killer who has detailed information about the agent - including the fact that he failed to save President John F. Kennedy from assassination. The caller is revealed as an ex-CIA assassin, and the agent, who is investigating a threat to the current president, is determined not to let history repeat itself.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: Based on a story by famed science fiction writer Philip K. Dick, "Minority Report" is an action-detective thriller set in Washington D.C. in 2054, where police utilize a psychic technology to arrest and convict murderers before they commit their crime. Tom Cruise plays the head of this Precrime unit and is himself accused of the future murder of a man he hasn't even met.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: Reading of the murder of a Kansas family, New York City novelist Truman Capote (Philip Seymour Hoffman) decides to cover the story himself, and travels to the small town with his childhood friend, aspiring novelist Harper Lee (Catherine Keener). When Perry Smith (Clifton Collins Jr.) and Dick Hickock (Mark Pellegrino) are arrested and charged, Capote forms an emotional bond with Smith during his jailhouse interviews despite the young criminal's apparent guilt.

programme.title: The Believers
programme.desc: Recently widowed psychiatrist Cal Jamison (Martin Sheen) has just moved back to New York City with his young son, Chris (Harley Cross), in an attempt to start over after his wife's horrific accidental death. Cal takes an assignment helping the police with the investigation of a cult-like and bizarre ritualistic double murder. As Cal gets closer to the truth, he realizes that he and those close to him may be the target of supernatural and deadly forces, and that the enemy is closer than he knows.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Insurance worker C.C. Baxter (Jack Lemmon) lends his Upper West Side apartment to company bosses to use for extramarital affairs. When his manager Mr. Sheldrake (Fred MacMurray) begins using Baxter's apartment in exchange for promoting him, Baxter is disappointed to learn that Sheldrake's mistress is Fran Kubelik (Shirley MacLaine), the elevator girl at work whom Baxter is interested in himself. Soon Baxter must decide between the girl he loves and the advancement of his career.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder
programme.desc: U.S. Navy pilot Lt. Jake Grafton (Brad Johnson) and his bombardier buddy, Lt. Cmdr. Virgil Cole (Willem Dafoe), are two soldiers embedded in the Vietnam War growing frustrated by the military's constraints on their missions. Despite the best efforts of their commanding officer, Cmdr. Frank Camparelli (Danny Glover), to re-engage them, this disillusioned pair decide to take the war effort into their own hands with an explosive battle plan that could well get them court-martialed.

programme.title: mother!
programme.desc: A young woman spends her days renovating the Victorian mansion that she lives in with her husband in the countryside. When a stranger knocks on the door one night, he becomes an unexpected guest in their home. Later, his wife and two children also arrive to make themselves welcome. Terror soon strikes when the beleaguered wife tries to figure out why her husband is so seemingly friendly and accommodating to everyone but her.

programme.title: Stargate: Continuum
programme.desc: The crew (Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping) of SG-1 battles an adversary (Cliff Simon) who alters the history of the Stargate.

programme.title: Ben-Hur
programme.desc: Judah Ben-Hur loses everything after his adopted brother Messala, now an officer in the Roman army, returns to Jerusalem and accuses the young prince of treason. Stripped of his title and separated from his wife and family, Ben-Hur must endure years of slavery on a galley at sea. When fate brings the estranged brothers to an epic and deadly chariot race, Ben-Hur finally gets the chance to exact vengeance on the man who destroyed his life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: When U.S. government operative Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and his mentor, Jim Phelps (Jon Voight), go on a covert assignment that takes a disastrous turn, Jim is killed, and Ethan becomes the prime murder suspect. Now a fugitive, Hunt recruits brilliant hacker Luther Stickell (Ving Rhames) and maverick pilot Franz Krieger (Jean Reno) to help him sneak into a heavily guarded CIA building to retrieve a confidential computer file that will prove his innocence.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: Tom Cruise returns to his role as Ethan Hunt in the second installment of "Mission: Impossible." This time Ethan Hunt leads his IMF team on a mission to capture a deadly German virus before it is released by terrorists. His mission is made impossible due to the fact that he is not the only person after samples of the disease. He must also contest with a gang of international terrorists headed by a turned bad former IMF agent who has already managed to steal the cure.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III
programme.desc: Retired from active duty, and training recruits for the Impossible Mission Force, agent Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) faces the toughest foe of his career: Owen Davian (Philip Seymour Hoffman), an international broker of arms and information, who is as cunning as he is ruthless. Davian emerges to threaten Hunt and all that he holds dear -- including the woman Hunt loves.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: Blamed for a terrorist attack on the Kremlin, Ethan Hunt (Tom Cruise) and the entire IMF agency are disavowed by the U.S. government, while the president initiates the Ghost Protocol. Forced to go "off the grid" -- left without resources or backup -- Hunt must somehow clear the agency's name and prevent another attack. Complicating matters even more, Ethan must undertake the impossible mission with a group of fellow IMF fugitives whose actual motives are suspect.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible Rogue Nation
programme.desc: With the IMF now disbanded and Ethan Hunt out in the cold, a new threat -- called the Syndicate -- soon emerges. The Syndicate is a network of highly skilled operatives who are dedicated to establishing a new world order via an escalating series of terrorist attacks. Faced with what may be the most impossible mission yet, Ethan gathers his team and joins forces with Ilsa Faust, a disavowed British agent who may or may not be a member of this deadly rogue nation.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: Zack Mayo (Richard Gere), a new member of the U.S. Navy, has a bad attitude. When he signs up for the Aviation Academy, he is met with the strict leadership of Sgt. Emil Foley (Louis Gossett Jr.), who gives Zack a rude awakening in terms of relating with other people. Through Foley's guidance -- and an unexpected romance with Paula (Debra Winger), an outsider who hangs around the naval base -- Zack learns some tough lessons and discovers what he truly wants out of life.

programme.title: Black Rain
programme.desc: New York City policemen Nick (Michael Douglas) and Charlie (Andy Garcia) witness a murder in a bar and quickly apprehend the assailant. The killer, named Sato (Yusaku Matsuda), is a member of Japan's infamous Yakuza mob, and Nick and Charlie must transport the gangster back to Osaka for his murder trial. There, Sato's fellow gangsters free him from police custody, forcing Nick and Charlie to scour Japan's dangerous underworld of organized crime in search of their fugitive.

programme.title: Saint Maud
programme.desc: Maud, an unstable, newly devout hospice nurse, becomes obsessed with saving her dying patient's soul -- but sinister forces and her own sinful past threaten her holy calling.

programme.title: Gorky Park
programme.desc: Soviet detective Arkady Renko (William Hurt) uncovers a vast network of deceit and intrigue when he investigates a triple murder that took place in Gorky Park, a Moscow amusement park. As Renko tries to make progress on the case, it becomes dangerously apparent that the KGB doesn't want this homicide to be solved. He eventually meets American Jack Osborne (Lee Marvin), who offers some clues, but Renko soon realizes that Osborne may be just as dangerous as the trailing KGB operatives.

programme.title: xXx: Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage (Vin Diesel) must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandora's Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: The musketeers rescue their king's true heir from the Bastille.

programme.title: Red Eye
programme.desc: In the wake of her grandmother's funeral, hotel manager Lisa Reisert is waiting to fly back home when she meets charming Jackson Rippner at check-in. She thinks it luck that they're seated together on the plane, but soon learns otherwise. Jackson hopes to assassinate the head of Homeland Security, but to do so, he needs Lisa to reassign the official's room number at her hotel. As insurance, Jackson has kidnapped Lisa's father.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: Tells the story of the legendary thirteenth century Scottish hero named William Wallace (Mel Gibson). Wallace rallies the Scottish against the English monarch and Edward I (Peter Hanly) after he suffers a personal tragedy by English soldiers. Wallace gathers a group of amateur warriors that is stronger than any English army.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: The Silence of the Lambs
programme.desc: Jodie Foster stars as Clarice Starling, a top student at the FBI's training academy. Jack Crawford (Scott Glenn) wants Clarice to interview Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins), a brilliant psychiatrist who is also a violent psychopath, serving life behind bars for various acts of murder and cannibalism. Crawford believes that Lecter may have insight into a case and that Starling, as an attractive young woman, may be just the bait to draw him out.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: Seven years have passed since Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) escaped from custody. The doctor is now at large in Europe. Mason Verger (Gary Oldman) remembers Lecter too, and is obsessed with revenge. Verger was Dr. Lecter's sixth victim, and though horribly disfigured, has survived. Verger realizes that to draw the doctor into the open, he must use someone as bait: Clarice Starling (Julianne Moore).

programme.title: Pet Sematary
programme.desc: Doctor Louis Creed (Dale Midkiff) moves his family to Maine, where he meets a friendly local named Jud Crandall (Fred Gwynne). After the Creeds' cat is accidentally killed, Crandall advises Louis to bury it in the ground near the old pet cemetery. The cat returns to life, its personality changed for the worse. When Louis' son, Gage (Miko Hughes), dies tragically, Louis decides to bury the boy's body in the same ground despite the warnings of Crandall and Louis' visions of a deceased patient.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery sends shockwaves through the town as Jade and Tabitha struggle with the weight of their revelation.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: 2 Days in the Valley
programme.desc: Dosmo Pizzo (Danny Aiello), an ordinary guy, finds himself involved in a murder-for-hire scheme. He is betrayed by his partner, the strangely serene Lee Woods (James Spader), who leaves him for dead. Suspecting that Woods will come back to finish him, Dosmo takes an obnoxious art dealer (Greg Cruttwell) and his sweet-natured assistant (Glenne Headly) hostage. Meanwhile, a rookie policeman (Eric Stoltz) investigating the murder begins to suspect that some kind of conspiracy is behind it.

programme.title: To Catch a Thief
programme.desc: Notorious cat burglar John Robie (Cary Grant) has long since retired to tend vineyards on the French Riviera. When a series of robberies is committed in his style, John must clear his name. Armed with a list of people who own the most expensive jewels currently in the area, John begins following the first owner, young Francie (Grace Kelly). When her jewels are stolen, Francie suspects John, destroying their tentative romance. John goes on the lam to catch the thief and clear his own name.

programme.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: In Santa Mira, California, Dr. Miles Bennell (Kevin McCarthy) is baffled when all his patients come to him with the same complaint: their loved ones seem to have been replaced by emotionless impostors. Despite others' dismissive denials, Dr. Bennell, his former girlfriend Becky (Dana Wynter) and his friend Jack (King Donovan) soon discover that the patients' suspicions are true: an alien species of human duplicates, grown from plant-like pods, is taking over the small town.

programme.title: Beauty Shop
programme.desc: Far from Chicago, hairdresser Gina Norris has relocated to Atlanta with her daughter and has quickly established herself as a rare talent in her profession. But after repeatedly butting heads with her shady, over-the-top boss, Jorge, Norris sets out to create her own salon -- even snagging a few of Jorge's employees and clients, including Lynn and Terri, respectively. Now, Jorge will do anything to shut her down.

programme.title: The Fire Inside
programme.desc: The story of Claressa "T-Rex" Shields, a boxer from Flint, Mich., who trained to become the first woman in her country's history to win an Olympic gold medal in the sport.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, they seek out an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: A big screen spin-off of the "Saturday Night Live" skit. Rob Lowe plays a producer that wants to take the public access "Wayne's World" to the world of commercial television. Wayne (Mike Myers) and Garth (Dana Carvey) battle to save their show and Wayne's girlfriend from Lowe.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2
programme.desc: After Wayne Campbell (Mike Myers) has a dream in which Jim Morrison tells him to put on a rock concert, he and fellow late-night TV star Garth Algar (Dana Carvey) try their hand at promoting. Several musical acts show little interest, leaving the pair uncertain about their ability to put on a successful show. Meanwhile, Cassandra (Tia Carrere), Wayne's rockstar girlfriend, has a new manager (Christopher Walken) who is trying to steal her away, and Wayne's antics only make things worse.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Ferris Bueller (Matthew Broderick) has an uncanny skill at cutting classes and getting away with it. Intending to make one last duck-out before graduation, Ferris calls in sick, "borrows" a Ferrari, and embarks on a one-day journey through the streets of Chicago. On Ferris' trail is high school principal Rooney (Jeffrey Jones), determined to catch him in the act.

programme.title: The Usual Suspects
programme.desc: "The greatest trick the devil ever pulled was convincing the world he didn't exist," says con man Kint, drawing a comparison to the most enigmatic criminal of all time, Keyser Söze. Kint attempts to convince the feds that the mythic crime lord not only exists, but is also responsible for drawing Kint and his four partners into a multi-million dollar heist that ended with an explosion in San Pedro Harbor - leaving few survivors.

programme.title: Road House
programme.desc: The Double Deuce is the meanest, loudest and rowdiest bar south of the Mason-Dixon Line, and Dalton (Patrick Swayze) has been hired to clean it up. He might not look like much, but the Ph.D.-educated bouncer proves he's more than capable -- busting the heads of troublemakers and turning the roadhouse into a jumping hot-spot. But Dalton's romance with the gorgeous Dr. Clay (Kelly Lynch) puts him on the bad side of cutthroat local big shot Brad Wesley (Ben Gazzara).

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: U.S. soldier Frank Dux (Jean-Claude Van Damme) has come to Hong Kong to be accepted into the Kumite, a highly secret and extremely violent martial-arts competition. While trying to gain access into the underground world of clandestine fighters, he also has to avoid military officers who consider him to be AWOL. After enduring a difficult training and beginning a romance with journalist Janice Kent (Leah Ayres), Frank is given the opportunity to fight. But can he survive?

programme.title: Death Warrant
programme.desc: An undercover officer (Jean-Claude Van Damme) investigates murder and mayhem in a prison where kickboxing comes in handy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Buckaroo Banzai Across the 8th Dimension
To Live and Die in L.A.
Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are high school buddies starting a band. However, they are about to fail their history class, which means Ted would be sent to military school. They receive help from Rufus (George Carlin), a traveler from a future where their band is the foundation for a perfect society. With the use of Rufus' time machine, Bill and Ted travel to various points in history, returning with important figures to help them complete their final history presentation.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure
programme.desc: Bill (Alex Winter) and Ted (Keanu Reeves) are high school buddies starting a band.
